source: How to Read a Keepa Chart (FULL Tutorial) Amazon FBA 2024.txt @13:29 — a dead-flat price line (brand-protection agency 'Pattern' controls the listing); Amazon's own share is only 8-18% (below our 20% rotation threshold) so our mechanical gates don't catch this, yet narrator: 'the likelihood of getting an IP complaint is very high... I would totally skip on this listing.' DIVERGENCE NOTE: a real case where a human-recognizable red flag (suspiciously flat pricing = brand policing) has NO corresponding signal in our current fact set at all — not something oa_hard_reject or any adjustment can detect from these fields, a genuine gap rather than a near-miss.
